ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for delivering the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, processing, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing address */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code used */,
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applied coupon */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the order was placed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the order request */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's default address */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., software, multimedia) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active and available for purchase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., PayPal, Stripe) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_status" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the delivery belongs to */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the delivery was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier (e.g., FedEx, UPS) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the delivery status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., sales, support, admin) */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's address */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the employee logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the comment belongs to */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_comments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_comments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_support" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who opened the ticket */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee handling the ticket */,
  "ticket_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was opened */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the support ticket has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the ticket (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as helpful */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, processed, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
